news_items.title: Google brings its Gemini Personal Intelligence feature to India
news_items.summary: The feature lets users connect Google accounts like Gmail and Photos to get personalized answers.

news_items.title: How vibe coding app Anything is rebuilding after getting booted from the App Store twice
news_items.summary: Anything is planning to launch a desktop companion app to aid mobile app development after its App Store removal.

news_items.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
news_items.summary: While many startups founded prior to the emergence of ChatGPT are struggling to position themselves for the AI era, Vercel, a 10-year-old dev tool and website hosting platform, is benefiting from the explosion of AI-generated apps and agents.

news_items.title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
news_items.summary: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

news_items.title: In just a couple weeks, StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
news_items.summary: The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it. There are still a few tickets available to join us and our stacked speaker lineup April 30, so register today!

news_items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
news_items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.

news_items.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
news_items.summary: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

news_items.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
news_items.summary: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

news_items.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
news_items.summary: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

news_items.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
news_items.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
